ideas.name: Asset Maintenance Forecast
ideas.desc: Predictive maintenance forecasting, asset health monitoring, budget projections, and work order planning for energy infrastructure including turbines, transformers, and pipelines. Tracks condition scores, failure rates, and generates prioritized work orders.

ideas.name: Emission Tracking
ideas.desc: Monitors GHG emissions by facility, tracks regulatory compliance, develops reduction plans, and analyzes carbon offset opportunities. Covers Scope 1/2/3 emissions (CO2, CH4, N2O) with reduction cost modeling and offset project evaluation.

ideas.name: Field Service Dispatch
ideas.desc: Manages field service dispatch, route optimization, technician assignment, and emergency response for energy infrastructure. Matches technicians by certification, zone, and capacity with efficiency-based scoring.

ideas.name: Permit & License Management
ideas.desc: Tracks permits and licenses across energy facilities, manages renewal calendars, identifies compliance gaps, and monitors applications. Covers Title V, NPDES, RCRA, pipeline operating, and spill prevention permits.

ideas.name: Regulatory Reporting
ideas.desc: Manages regulatory report status, data validation, submission tracking, and audit readiness for EPA, FERC, and state filings. Validates data quality from CEMS, SAP, PIMS, and GIS source systems.
